notableEvents.label: Kyle Karros GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Karros grounds into a double play, shortstop Andrés Giménez to second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Brenton Doyle out at 2nd. Kyle Karros out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jordan Beck pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Beck flies out to right fielder Nathan Lukes.

notableEvents.label: Edouard Julien pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Edouard Julien lines out sharply to right fielder Nathan Lukes.
